# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  service-settings.yaml: |
    apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/serviceconfig/v1alpha2
    kind: ServiceConfig
    metadata:
      name: '*'
    spec:
      server:
        enabled: true
      authorization:
        mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-injector
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: '*'
spec:
  servers: []
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: '*'
spec:
  peers: []
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/serviceconfig/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceConfig
metadata:
  name: '*'
spec:
  server:
    enabled: true
  authorization:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-policy-server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-authorization-server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-service-account
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
